When GPU memory is your bottleneck, PEFT methods are a game-changer. This guide explains the math, the tradeoffs, and the code for fine-tuning large models on a single GPU.

Why Medical AI Is Hard: Distribution Shift, Data Scarcity, and Trust in Clinical Settings
